records.display_name: Malcolm X Blvd / Utica Ave Transit Improvements

description: Install curbside southbound bus lane and queue jump signal phases for northbound and southbound B46 buses at Utica Ave and Atlantic Ave
2019 priority project identified under Better Buses Action Plan; includes curbside bus lanes on Malcolm X Blvd and Utica Ave in Brooklyn

2019 priority project identified under Better Buses Action Plan. Includes implemented southbound bus lane from Fulton St to Atlantic Ave (photo enforced) and proposed curbside bus lane from Chauncey St to Fulton St.

2019 priority project identified in the Better Buses Action Plan. Includes curbside bus lane (Fulton St to Atlantic Ave, southbound), queue jump signal at Utica Ave & Atlantic Ave, B46 upgrade to articulated buses, and future curbside bus lane (Chauncey St to Fulton St, southbound).

Better Buses Action Plan 2019 priority project identified due to high ridership, slow bus speeds, unreliable travel times, and high volumes of buses. Includes a southbound bus lane on Malcolm X Blvd from Chauncey St to Fulton St, and a previously implemented southbound bus lane on Malcolm X Blvd from Fulton St to Atlantic Ave.
project_name: Malcolm X Blvd / Utica Ave Transit Improvements
status: 2019 priority project; Fulton St to Atlantic Ave segment implemented July-Dec 2019; Chauncey St to Fulton St proposed for Spring 2020

B46 Local service. Travel times decreased 8% to 15% after bus lane installation.

Brooklyn's busiest bus route (38,000 daily riders). Connects Bed-Stuy to 3 4 A C J Z + 30 bus routes. Upgraded to Select Bus Service in 2016. Upgraded to articulated buses in January 2020.
B46 Select Bus Service, Brooklyn's busiest bus route with 38,000 daily riders. Launched July 2016. Connects Bed-Stuy to subway lines and 30 bus routes.
Existing B46 Limited-stop service running along Utica Avenue and Malcolm X Boulevard. Limited stops will either be converted to SBS stops or local stops.
Proposed B46 Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue. Northern terminal at DeKalb Av, making SBS stops from DeKalb Av to Avenue U (Kings Plaza). Will not make local stops south of Avenue H.

payload.location_text: Chauncey St to Fulton St, Malcolm X Blvd, Brooklyn (southbound only)
